series_metadata.series_description: Record of Hearing findings. Files include decisions written by state hearing officer, identifying information, record of events and persons involved, statement of the issues, summarized statement of facts, conclusions, citation of agency regulations, and final administrative decision and order. Also may contain Statistical Data for Federal Report SSA 4105 (DHS-4004) and State Hearing Decision form (DHS-4005). Administrative Appeal Decisions, County Review decisions, and any correspondence generated from HATS by hearing officer and county review decisions.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office, 4, years then destroy., Electronic: Erase
